chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-264 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 23.04.2025 Mr. Vinod Kumar G. Jessrani, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, D.A.G a/w Sub Inspector Nisar Ali Abbasi, Enquiry Officer, F.I.A. Larkana. ------ Pursuant to directions issued in the earlier part of the day, Sub-Inspector Nisar Ali Abbasi, Enquiry Officer, F.I.A. Larkana has recorded statement of the petitioner in the Court and places copy of same on record. He further submits that no F.I.R. has been registered against the petitioner; however, after completion of enquiry in the light of Statement, he shall dispose of same by placing copy of it on record through Additional Registrar. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of. Judge Judge Manzoo
